Klasse AnimatedTrain

java.lang.Object
de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
public class AnimatedTrain extends Object
Represents a train with animated movement between stations. This class tracks a train's current segment, calculates its position based on simulation time, and manages multi-segment journeys. The train's position is interpolated linearly between start and end stations based on elapsed time and total segment duration.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    AnimatedTrain(String name, Station startStation, Station endStation, LocalDateTime departureTime, LocalDateTime arrivalTime, int finalStationId)
    Creates a new animated train.

    Methode
    Beschreibung

    Calculates the train's current position on the map.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • AnimatedTrain

      public AnimatedTrain(String name, Station startStation, Station endStation, LocalDateTime departureTime, LocalDateTime arrivalTime, int finalStationId)
      Creates a new animated train.
      Parameter:
      name - the train's display name
      startStation - the current segment's starting station
      endStation - the current segment's ending station
      departureTime - scheduled departure time from start station
      arrivalTime - scheduled arrival time at end station
      finalStationId - the ID of the train's ultimate destination

  • Methodendetails

    • getProgress

      public double getProgress()
      Calculates the train's progress along the current segment. Uses simulation time to determine how far the train has traveled between departure and arrival times. Handles time wraparound for segments crossing the hour boundary by adding 3600 seconds when negative durations are detected.
      Gibt zurück:
      a value between 0.0 (at start station) and 1.0 (at end station)

    • getCurrentPosition

      public Point2D.Double getCurrentPosition()
      Calculates the train's current position on the map. Uses linear interpolation between start and end station coordinates based on the current progress percentage.
      Gibt zurück:
      a Point2D representing the train's current (x, y) position

    • updateSegment

      public void updateSegment(Station newStart, Station newEnd, LocalDateTime newDeparture, LocalDateTime newArrival)
      Updates the train to a new segment. Used when the train moves from one track segment to the next in its multi-segment journey.
      Parameter:
      newStart - the new segment's starting station
      newEnd - the new segment's ending station
      newDeparture - the departure time from the new start station
      newArrival - the arrival time at the new end station

    • isAtFinalDestination

      public boolean isAtFinalDestination()
      Checks if the train has reached its final destination. A train is at its final destination when it has completed progress on the segment ending at the final station.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the train is at the final destination, false otherwise

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the train's display name.
      Gibt zurück:
      the train name

    • getStartStation

      public Station getStartStation()
      Gets the current segment's starting station.
      Gibt zurück:
      the start station

    • getEndStation

      public Station getEndStation()
      Gets the current segment's ending station.
      Gibt zurück:
      the end station

    • getDepartureTime

      public LocalDateTime getDepartureTime()
      Gets the scheduled departure time from the current segment's start station.
      Gibt zurück:
      the departure time

    • getArrivalTime

      public LocalDateTime getArrivalTime()
      Gets the scheduled arrival time at the current segment's end station.
      Gibt zurück:
      the arrival time

    • getFinalStationId

      public int getFinalStationId()
      Gets the ID of the train's final destination station.
      Gibt zurück:
      the final station ID
